data.title: 国际服APP STORE登顶礼物
data.summary: [Apple App Store #1 Appreciation Gift] Thanks to your love and support, Blue Archive has reached #1
data.body:
[Apple App Store #1 Appreciation Gift]

Thanks to your love and support, Blue Archive has reached #1 on Apple Appstore!🎉
To celebrate, we have prepared an appreciation gift. Please check your mailbox in-game!🎁

#BlueArchive![esytxqd7BC4pGRPTZJElDs86XClYSO4Q.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/esytxqd7BC4pGRPTZJElDs86XClYSO4Q.jpg)
